channel.title: GNmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mexican Street Corn Chicken Casserole
item.description: This casserole brings together classic elote flavors — lime, Tajin, sweet corn, and a creamy base — in a hearty baked dish.

item.title: 8 Ways to Meet Your Daily Protein Goals
American Express Membership Rewards: Earning, Redeeming, and Transferring Points
item.description: A guide to understanding how American Express Membership Rewards points work, from earning and spending to maximizing travel value.

item.title: When to Apply for Popular Capital One Credit Cards, Based on Offer History
item.description: A look at the historical sign-up offers on popular Capital One cards to help applicants determine whether current deals are competitive.
